name: shipkit
description: Code Development OS — 14 agents, 7 production-hardening skills, 6-phase pipeline. Works as a universal plugin across AI coding agents.
author: Akakaui

skills.name: production-hardening
skills.description: Master prod-readiness checklist. Coordinates all sub-skills for production deployment.

skills.name: infra-networking
skills.description: CDN, DNS, WAF, load balancers, SSL, DDoS protection, multi-region deployment

skills.name: container-orch
skills.description: Docker, Compose, Kubernetes, Helm, service discovery, CI/CD for containers

skills.name: db-scale
skills.description: Connection pooling, read replicas, sharding, migration strategies, query optimization

skills.name: resilience-patterns
skills.description: Rate limiting, circuit breakers, retries with backoff, graceful degradation, bulkheads

skills.name: security-hardening
skills.description: OWASP Top 10, auth hardening, encryption, SBOM, compliance, audit logging

skills.name: prod-ops
skills.description: Monitoring, alerting, SLOs/SLIs, incident response, backup/restore, cost optimization

agents.name: code
agents.description: Master orchestrator — routes to sub-agents, runs quality gates

agents.name: auto-detect
agents.description: Classifies project type SaaS/API/CLI and loads skills

agents.name: github-tracker
agents.description: Watches PRs, issues, releases, CI status
